name: pob-docker-mcp
description: One-command Docker runtime for Path of Building MCP plus a PoB build analysis skill.

interface.shortDescription: Run Path of Building MCP from Docker and use it from agent CLIs.
interface.longDescription: PoB Docker MCP provides a one-command Docker stdio MCP server for Path of Building, bundling pob-mcp with the api-stdio PathOfBuilding fork. It also includes a skill for using the MCP server to inspect, compare, and improve Path of Building builds.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use PoB Docker MCP to analyze my Path of Building build.
